results.title: Streeting suggests north sea drilling and NI cuts in latest pitch
results.description: Former health secretary Wes Streeting has suggested cutting national insurance and issuing new North Sea oil drilling licenses as he continues to make his leadership pitch. In an interview with the Sunday Times, Streeting set out a series of policies ahead of a potential leadership contest expected within the coming months in Westminster, including drilling [...]

results.title: Massive security plan finalized for Gilgit-Baltistan elections
results.description: CHILAS: Punjab Police will deploy 5,000 personnel to assist with security duties for the upcoming Gilgit-Baltistan (GB) elections scheduled for June 7, according to official sources. Authorities said the decision was taken after a request for additional security support to ensure peaceful conduct of the Gilgit-Baltistan elections. results.title: Lawmakers push for expanded cancer screenings for 9/11 responders
results.description: WASHINGTON — A bipartisan group of lawmakers, including Congressman Mike Lawler (R,NY-17), is urging the federal government to expand cancer screening coverage for 9/11 responders and survivors enrolled in the World Trade Center Health Program. Lawler, and Congressmen Andrew Garbarino and Dan Goldman joined Democratic U.S. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand in leading 26 members of Congress [...]

results.title: IPS officer Ananya Awasthi appointed first woman ADC to Odisha Governor
results.description: Bhubaneswar, May 31 (SocialNews.XYZ) Odisha Governor Dr Hari Babu Kambhampati has appointed IPS officer Ananya Awasthi as the Aide-de-Camp (ADC) to the Governor, making her the first woman officer to serve in the prestigious position.... results.title: Middletown officials to consider a repeal of the backyard chicken ban
results.description: Middletown officials are set to take up another discussion about the township's backyard chicken policy, this time with members of the planning commission.
